description: A fish farm manager gets an alert from a water quality sensor in a shrimp pond indicating low dissolved oxygen levels.

nodes.task_description: Acknowledge the low dissolved oxygen alert.

expected_outcome.value: Agent confirms the oxygen level is below the critical threshold.

nodes.task_description: Automatically activate the pond's aeration system to increase oxygen levels.

expected_outcome.value: Agent successfully turns on the aerators.

nodes.task_description: Advise the manager to temporarily reduce feeding, as decomposition of uneaten feed consumes oxygen.

expected_outcome.value: Agent provides a sound management recommendation.
